case_title: HUGO BURET ET AL VS. LES KIDZ LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2022 BY DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF HUGO BURET IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SORCHA BURET IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HUGO BURET, HUSBAND. DEFENDANT LES KIDZ LLC, REPRESENTED BY LISA LEBOUEF, FOUNER AND CEO IS PRESENT. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG HEARING TODAY'S MATTER. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-14-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,450.00 FILED BY BURET, HUGO BURET, SORCHA AS TO DEFENDANT LES KIDZ LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON NOVEMBER 14, 2022)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURET, HUGO BURET, SORCHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LES KIDZ LLC $2,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT LES KIDZ LLC
